ogTitle: Goondiwindi vs Goorganga Plains: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Goondiwindi and Goorganga Plains.
heading: Goondiwindi vs Goorganga Plains — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Goondiwindi, Queensland and Goorganga Plains, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Goorganga Plains has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Goondiwindi (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Goondiwindi or Goorganga Plains safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Goondiwindi has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Goorganga Plains scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Goondiwindi scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Goorganga Plains scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Goondiwindi or Goorganga Plains?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Goorganga Plains has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
